Class KeyboardShortcutAdapter

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.extension.api.KeyboardShortcutAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts
public abstract class KeyboardShortcutAdapter extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts
Adapter for KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts interface.

This adapter helps at implementing the keyboard shortcuts interface correctly, by supporting dispatching for the common shortcut extension points.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface KeYGuiExtension.KeyboardShortcuts

    GOAL_LIST, INFO_VIEW, MAIN_WINDOW, PROOF_TREE_VIEW, SEQUENT_VIEW, SOURCE_VIEW, STRATEGY_SELECTION_VIEW
